title: GUI Addon Pack
description: This resourcepack adds a more fantasy design for all the minecraft inventories and GUIs
body:
![GUI_Banner](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030503753218011267/gui_banner.png?width=1026&height=215)

**GUI Addon Pack**

This resourcepack adds a more fantasy design for all the minecraft inventories and GUIs. As well as support for the menu of the MorePlayerModels mod by Noppes.


**Dependencies**

- None

*This pack is (in theory!) compatible with all Minecraft versions 1.13+ and maybe even earlier...
**BUT!** I only tested it for the versions promoted on this page and won't fix problems on older versions!*


**Installation**

- Download the texturepack

- Drag it into your resource pack folder

    - Either via .minecraft -> resourcepacks

    - Or ingame via [ESC] -> Options -> Resourcepacks -> Open Folder...

- Activate the texture pack

 
**Errors and questions**

*(Discord is not yet fully translated)*

*Please leave credit when you use this pack in Livestreams, Videos, or other projects.*

*You're not allowed to export the models from the pack or use them in another context than MPM without my explicit permission!*
